headline: What Is Metanomics? More On The Metaverse Phrase For A Trillion Dollar Opportunity
summary: The growth of the metaverse continues as large companies place monetary bets and file trademarks for digital worlds. Here is a look at what the metaverse could mean economically.

headline: Norwegian Sovereign Wealth Fund To Vote Against Apple's Executive Pay Plan
summary: The pay disparity between Apple, Inc. (NASDAQ: AAPL) CEO Tim Cook  and an average worker at the company has raised many eyebrows, and the latest to oppose the executive compensation plan is the world's largest sovereign wealth fund.

headline: Top 10 NFTs By Weekly Sales Volume: Invisible Friends Tops List, Tubby Cats, Starcatchers, Howlerz Join Leaders
summary: The non-fungible token market continues to heat up with strong sales volume on OpenSea, an NFT marketplace for buying and selling items.

headline: Russia Ukraine Conflict Not Having Impact On NASA's Relationship With Russia, Yet
summary: The invasion of Ukraine by Russia has led to U.S. sanctions on Russia and increased turmoil between the two countries.

headline: Apple Is Working A Foldable iPad/MacBook; Could Launch By 2026
summary: Apple, Inc. (NASDAQ: AAPL) is an innovator and disruptor when it comes to its products and services. Cupertino's future product pipeline could also include a foldable version of its iPad/MacBook, according to Bloomberg's Mark Gurman.

headline: How Apple Can Win With A $199 iPhone
summary: Apple, Inc. (NASDAQ: AAPL) has several launch events lined up for 2022, if reports are anything to go by.

headline: 12 Key Differences Between Web 2.0 and Web 3.0: Virtual Worlds, Play To Earn Games, Digital Tokens, NFTs And More
summary: Growth of the metaverse continues to pick up steam, with companies placing monetary bets and filing for trademarks related to the new growth sector.

headline: How Apple, Tesla, Meta And Other Companies Respond to Russia's Aggression Against Ukraine
summary: Russia's invasion of Ukraine has mobilized the world against the former's unilateral actions, and the developments in Eastern Europe are seen as disrupting the world order and its peace. Top executives of some U.S. corporations have chimed in with their views and reactions to the crisis.

headline: What Is McDonald's CEO Chris Kempczinski Net Worth? CEO Interview Breaks Down Competitive Advantages
summary: Since November 2019, Chris Kempczinski has served as the CEO of McDonald’s Corp (NYSE: MCD). Here is a look at his net worth, job history and what he sees as the competitive advantages for the fast-food giant going forward.

headline: Is Tesla FSD Beta Testing Coming In Canada Anytime Soon? Elon Musk Responds
summary: Tesla, Inc.'s (NASDAQ: TSLA) full-self driving package is touted to be a major revenue earner for the company when mass adoption kicks in. The company is running several iterations of FSD beta testing in the U.S. in order to be make it as perfect as possible.

headline: The Week Ahead In Biotech (Feb. 27-March 5): Earnings, Multiple Regulatory Decisions Take The Spotlight
summary: Biopharma stocks lock-stepped with the broader market in the week ending Feb. 25 before finishing higher. The trajectory was the same, with the sector declining in the first two sessions of the holiday-shortened week before making a comeback.

headline: Ukrainian Official Asks Elon Musk For Starlink Satellites To Maintain Internet Amid Invasion
summary: The Ukrainian government has put out an S.O.S. to Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) CEO Elon Musk for a donation of the SpaceX Starlink satellites to overcome internet outages created by invading Russian forces.

headline: Barron's Latest Picks And Pans: Macy's, Advanced Micro Devices, Tesla, Dollar General And More
summary: This weekend's Barron's cover story notes that the biggest implication for the U.S. of the Russia-Ukraine invasion may be that the conflict emboldens bigger economic rivals, namely China.
